idea-plugin.name: IdeSense - IDE MCP Server
idea-plugin.description:
Supercharge your AI coding assistant with the IDE's powerful code intelligence through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

If this plugin saves you time, consider buying me a coffee! ☕

Multi-Language Support

Advanced code intelligence tools work across multiple languages when their plugins are available:

  • Java & Kotlin - IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio
  • Python - PyCharm (all editions), IntelliJ IDEA with Python plugin
  • JavaScript & TypeScript - WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PhpStorm
  • Go - GoLand, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with Go plugin
  • PHP - PhpStorm, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with PHP plugin
  • Rust - RustRover, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with Rust plugin, CLion

Universal Tools (All Supported IDEs)

These tools work in every supported JetBrains IDE:

  • Find References - Locate all usages of any symbol across your project
  • Go to Definition - Jump to symbol declarations instantly
  • Find Class - Fast class/interface search by name (exact by default; optional fuzzy camelCase/substring matching)
  • Find File - Fast file search by name using IDE's file index
  • Symbol Search - Find classes, methods, functions, and fields by name with IntelliJ Go to Symbol matching
  • Search Text - Text search using IDE's pre-built word index with context filtering
  • Code Diagnostics - Access errors, warnings, and available quick fixes
  • Index Status - Check if the IDE is ready for code intelligence
  • Sync Files - Force-sync IDE state with external file changes on demand
  • Read File - Read file content by path or qualified name, including library sources (disabled by default)
  • File Structure - View hierarchical file structure like IDE's Structure view, for any language with a registered structure-view factory

Extended Tools (Language-Aware)

These tools activate based on available language plugins:

  • Type Hierarchy - Explore class inheritance chains (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, Go, PHP, Rust)
  • Call Hierarchy - Trace method/function call relationships (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, Go, PHP, Rust)
  • Find Implementations - Discover all implementations of interfaces and abstract methods (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, PHP, Rust)
  • Find Super Methods - Navigate through method override hierarchies (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, PHP), interface satisfaction (Go), or trait fn/const/type alias overrides (Rust)

Refactoring Tools

  • Rename Refactoring - Safe symbol renaming with automatic reference updates - works across ALL languages, fully headless (disabled by default)
  • Move File - Move a file to a new directory with language-aware reference, import, and package/namespace updates when the IDE provides a semantic move backend (disabled by default)

Why This Plugin?

  • True semantic understanding - Uses the IDE's AST and index, not text matching
  • Cross-project awareness - Works across modules, files, and library dependencies
  • Multi-language - Automatically detects and uses language-specific handlers
  • Safe refactoring - All changes support undo (Ctrl/Cmd+Z)
  • Zero external calls - Everything runs locally in your IDE

Supported AI Assistants

  • Claude Code (CLI)
  • Claude Desktop
  • Codex CLI
  • Cursor
  • Windsurf
  • VS Code with MCP extension
  • Any MCP-compatible client

Quick Start

  1. Install plugin and restart IDE
  2. Open IdeSense tool window (bottom panel)
  3. Click "Install on Coding Agents"
  4. Select your AI assistant and follow the instructions

See the GitHub repository for detailed documentation and examples.

action.description: Copy the MCP server URL to clipboard
Copy MCP client configuration for AI assistants
Install or export the companion skill for AI coding agents
